name: coldrig
description: Agent-native cold-email infrastructure. Bundles the hosted, 24-tool Coldrig MCP server (domains, mailboxes, campaigns, inbox, metrics, lead disposition) so your agent runs outbound email end to end with one bearer token — no dashboard required. Real sending is live in production (Gmail API, HTTPS/443), plus a free sandbox demo. New accounts activate real sending via a short concierge step. $99/mo for 5 mailboxes.
